snippet.title: Shor Machega Song: Yo Yo Honey Singh, Hommie Dilliwala | Mumbai Saga | Emraan Hashmi, John Abraham
snippet.description:
Presenting brand new party song "Shor Machega" from upcoming bollywood movie "Mumbai Saga" in the voice of “Yo Yo Honey Singh” & "Hommie Dilliwala". The lyrics of new song are penned by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Hommie Dilliwala &  music produced by Yo Yo Honey Singh. 
Mumbai Saga, directed by Sanjay Gupta, produced by Bhushan Kumar and Krishan Kumar (T-Series), Anuradha Gupta (White Feather Films) and Sangeeta Ahir.
Movie Releasing on March 19, 2021.
#ShorMachega #MumbaiSaga #YoYoHoneySingh

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book “ Mafia Queens of Mumbai” written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai – The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Episode 732 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: King - Blanko | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
LYRICS:

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse 1

Maine Din bhi sudhaar liye,
Kapde bhi sawaar liye,
Abhi kitna kama rahe,
Tune chhote hi sawaal kiye.

Tera zikar chhupa liya,
Aur khudse malaal kiye,
Na soch sakoge tum
Humne itne kamaal kiye.

Afsos hota hai bas hume is baat ka,
Tum dil mein jaana kabhi nahi jhaanke.

Tum humse aisa pyaar kabhi kar na sake,
Jaisi ye duniya karti hain baatein.

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse2

Faslon mein,
Bhi raza teri.
Mushkilon mein,
Kyu wafa meri.

Main hasun na,
Khwahishein teri,
Tu roye na,
Ye dua meri.

Jo mujhse door jayegi,
To jaana toot jayegi,
Ye duniya hai khayalon ki,
Tu sach mein ruth jayegi.

Main tujhse kya chhupaunga,
Tu mujhko kya btayegi,
Tu jab bhi aankhein band karle,
Saamne mujhko payegi.

Pre-Chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya - 2.T

CREDITS:

Artist - King
Lyrics By King
Composed By King
Female Lead - Drutika Singh
Music Produced By Section 8
Mixing - Rahul Sathu
Master - Abhishek Ghatak

This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT.
Digitally marketed By
Kingsclan Marketing.

Directed By Miikey
Cinematography& Edit By Yash Chhabra

Digital Promotions By KCM.

mr.title: आई, मी आणि शॉपिंग | #bhadipa
mr.description:
पुन्हा एकदा घेऊन आलो आहोत आई, अनि, जुई आणि त्यांचे मजेशीर किस्से. ह्या नवीन भागात आई शिकवत आहे अनि आणि जुईला शॉपिंग चे उपयोगी धडे. ह्या शॉपिंगच्या परीक्षेत होणार ते पास का मिळणार त्यांना मार्क शून्य? जाणून घेण्यासाठी हा व्हिडिओ शेवटपर्यंत पाहा. 
अशा काँटेंट साठी #भाडिपा ला सबस्क्राईब करा, शास्त्र असतं ते!  

श्रेयावली -
कलाकार
रेणुका दफ्तरदार
मृण्मयी गोडबोले
आलोक राजवाडे

दिग्दर्शन - ओमकार जाधव
लेखक - कौस्तुभ सोमण, सारंग साठे
सहयोगी दिग्दर्शक - सागरिका जोशी
सहाय्यक दिग्दर्शक - अभिप्राय कामठे
क्रिएटिव्ह प्रोड्युसर - पॉला मॅग्लेन
छायांकन - चैतन्य पुराणिक
ध्वनी - सौरभ मोरगावकर
प्रोडक्शन मॅनेजर - प्राजक्ता सालबर्डे
रनर - मंगेश दादा
स्पॉट 1 - शिव दादा
केटरींग - सुनीता तेरदाळकर 
संकलन - अनुजा भंडारे
सोशल मीडिया - अनिकेत जाधव, पूजा परब, तन्वी कुलकर्णी, रिचा जावळेकर

snippet.description:
Is love enough when life happens? Chup is a captivating story highlighting millennial love, passion, hard work, hustle, sacrifices, temptations and heartbreak.
Catch Siddharth Nigam in an all new avatar of a smitten lover waking up to the harsh realities of life and Rits Badiani who aces the bubbly yet ambitious love interest pulled in different directions between her head and heart.

snippet.title: Oorigobba Raaja-Yuvarathnaa (Kannada) - Puneeth Rajkumar |Santhosh Ananddram|Thaman S| Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting the Kannada song 'Oorigobba Raaja' from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa' by Hombale Films

Oorigobba Raaja, a scintillating party number, is all set to drive us crazy. Watch the duo Sayyeshaa Saigal and Puneeth Rajkumar burn up the dance floor. With Jaani Master's hook steps in the Kannada new song you, won't resist but to replicate. With superb lyrics penned by Santhosh Anandram. Hear the music by Thaman S. Which will not fail but to leave a mark on your playlists!

Get a chance to hear the other Yuvarathnaa songs and music tracks by staying subscribed to Hombale Films YouTube Channel. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Sometimes all you need is some good music. And JioSaavn will have it covered for you with the latest song 'Oorigobba Raaja' from the upcoming Kannada cinema 'Yuvarathnaa.'
https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/oorigobba-raaja/GwMpWgJyYgc

Geetha tells Vijay to stop chasing her as she has nothing more to say to him. When Vijay stops Geetha from walking away and hugs her, will Geetha's true feelings surface? Tune in to this sneak peek of the upcoming episode
#ColorsKannada #Geetha

To subscribe this channel go to:http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=etvkannadaindia
To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1
Follow us on: 
https://www.facebook.com/colorskannada
https://www.instagram.com/colorskannadaofficial/

Geetha is the story of a bright and young girl who endures hardships at the hands of an influential man. Strong and confident of herself, she challenges her circumstances and stands up for herself. Geetha is living in a house that doesn't want her, with a husband who doesn't love her. Can she make her house, her home? Can she fight her fate and turn it around? watch the story unfold, now on Voot.

snippet.title: GOLI MAAR DE - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar | Asees Kaur | Anshul Garg |Rajat Nagpal Vicky Sandhu
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Goli Maar De sung by Asees Kaur ft. Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar.

Stream full song here

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/goli-maar-de-2
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Goli-Maar-De/Goli-Maar-De/AyYeUzppYAA?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/3jyEv2uLWWTk9K1fQuHkYT?si=XqM2bkllRxmx_ZGgt2arpA&utm_source=whatsapp
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08X4J71ZN?trackAsin=B08X4J36MM&ref=dm_sh_97ZKhC6OyKL4wWxHSxy64bBK8
Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/music/album/goli-maar-de/bl_3616553446935
Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJdh3uT9/
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/in/album/goli-maar-de-single/1554975645



Singer - Asees Kaur
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Composition- Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal

Featuring - Rohit Zinjurke & Nita Shilimkar

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Rav Dhillon 
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
Dop - Yuvraj Indori
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
chorographer - John 
Production - Kuldeep 
Editing - Zipsi 
Colour - Onkar
Stylist - Outro by Akshita & Anulika 
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital


Lyrics :

Karda rehnda a ignore ve 
Tere moohre chalda ni zor ve 
Shelian to rakhdi lukake tenu main 
Mere bina takki na koi hor ve 
Kolo d mukh fer langde eh hunde ni Asool pyar de 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Jini vaari tere vall Dekha sohnya 
Tera ta dhyan mere vall howe na
Odo tk tenu kuj feel hunda na 
Jado tak tere moohre kuri rowe na 
Tu Khijea Rehna a roz ve 
Kde hass meri Jind thaarde 
J sade vall Takna ..
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde 

Matchinga main Kardi a Jaan jaan Ke 
Jaan bujh Notice tu Krda e nai 
Mere bina rehna a tu bada  khush ve 
Tere bina Pal Mera sarda e nai 
Vicky Sandhu Main Chaluni apni Band Kar tere gere bahar de .. 
Je sade vall Takkna nai channa ve sade Goli maarde.


#GoliMaarDe #RohitZinjurke #NitaShilimkar

snippet.title: Sanjay Rathod Resign | ..म्हणून मी राजीनामा दिला, राजीनाम्यानंतर संजय राठोड यांची पहिली प्रतिक्रिया
snippet.description:
मुंबई : पूजा चव्हाण आत्महत्या प्रकरणी मंत्री संजय राठोड यांनी अखेर राजीनामा दिला आहे. राजीनामा दिल्यानंतर संजय राठोड यांनी आपली पहिली प्रतिक्रिया दिली आहे. विरोधी पक्षाने घाणेरडं राजकारण करुन माझी आणि माझ्या समाजाची बदनामी करण्याचा प्रयत्न केला. मला राजकीय जीवनातून उठवण्याचा प्रयत्न झाला आहे. म्हणून या प्रकरणाची चौकशी व्हावी आणि या प्रकरणातून सत्य बाहेर यावे, यासाठी मी माझ्या मंत्रीपदाचा राजीनामा दिला असल्याचे राठोड म्हणाले.

राजीनामा देतो पण या प्रकरणाची चौकशी झाल्यानंतर त्याचा स्वीकार करावा अशी काहीशी भूमिका संजय राठोड यांनी घेतली होती. आपले मंत्रिपद टिकावं म्हणून संजय राठोड शेवटपर्यंत प्रयत्न करत होते. संजय राठोड यांचा राजीनामा घ्यावा यासाठी मुख्यमंत्री उद्धव ठाकरे यांच्यावर मोठा दबाव होता. या प्रकरणावरुन शिवसेना आणि महाविकास आघाडीवर टीकेची झोड उडवली जात होती.

Subscribe to our YouTube channel here: https://www.youtube.com/c/ABPMajhaTV

For latest breaking news (#MarathiNews #ABPMajhaVideos #ABPमाझा ) log on to: https://abpmajha.abplive.in/
Social Media Handles:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/abpmajha/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/abpmajhatv
https://www.instagram.com/abpmajhatv/
Google+ : https://plus.google.com/+AbpMajhaLIVE

Download ABP App for Apple: https://itunes.apple.com/in/app/abp-live-abp-news-abp-ananda/id811114904?mt=8
Download ABP App for Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.winit.starnews.hin&hl=en

ABP Majha (ABP माझा) is a 24x7 Marathi news channel in India. The Mumbai-based company was launched on 22 June 2007. The channel is owned by ABP Group. Mirroring the aspirations and distinct socio-political characteristics of the region, ABP Majha (formerly STAR Majha) has captured the hearts of 12 million Indians weekly, in a short time. सात बाराच्या बातम्या (Saat Barachya Batmya) and माझा कट्टा (Majha Katta) are two of the many important programs on the channel. ABP Majha has become a Marathi news hub which provides you with the comprehensive up-to-date news coverage from Maharashtra, all over India and the world. Get the latest top stories, current affairs, sports, business, entertainment, politics, spirituality, and many more here only on ABP Majha in Marathi language.

राजीनामा देतो पण या प्रकरणाची चौकशी झाल्यानंतर त्याचा स्वीकार करावा अशी काहीशी भूमिका संजय राठोड यांनी घेतली होती. आपले मंत्रिपद टिकावं म्हणून संजय राठोड शेवटपर्यंत प्रयत्न करत होते. संजय राठोड यांचा राजीनामा घ्यावा यासाठी मुख्यमंत्री उद्धव ठाकरे यांच्यावर मोठा दबाव होता. या प्रकरणावरुन शिवसेना आणि महाविकास आघाडीवर टीकेची झोड उडवली जात होती.

ABP Majha (ABP माझा) is a 24x7 Marathi news channel in India. The Mumbai-based company was launched on 22 June 2007. The channel is owned by ABP Group. Mirroring the aspirations and distinct socio-political characteristics of the region, ABP Majha (formerly STAR Majha) has captured the hearts of 12 million Indians weekly, in a short time. सात बाराच्या बातम्या (Saat Barachya Batmya) and माझा कट्टा (Majha Katta) are two of the many important programs on the channel. ABP Majha has become a Marathi news hub which provides you with the comprehensive up-to-date news coverage from Maharashtra, all over India and the world. Get the latest top stories, current affairs, sports, business, entertainment, politics, spirituality, and many more here only on ABP Majha in Marathi language.

snippet.title: PM Narendra Modi inaugurates 'The India Toy Fair 2021'
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi will inaugurate The India Toy Fair 2021 on 27th February at 11 AM via video conferencing.

#TheIndiaToyFair #Vocal4LocalToys

Toys play a significant part in the development of a child’s mind and also help improve psychomotor and cognitive skills in children. In his Mann ki Baat address in August 2020, the Prime Minister had said that toys not only augment activity, but also give flight to aspirations. Noting the importance of toys in the holistic development of a child, the Prime Minister has earlier also emphasized boosting toy manufacturing in India. The India Toy Fair 2021 is being organized in line with this vision of the Prime Minister.

About the Fair

The Fair will be held from 27th February to 2nd March 2021. It aims to bring together all stakeholders including buyers, sellers, students, teachers, designers etc. on a virtual platform to create sustainable linkages and encourage dialogue for the overall development of the industry. Through this platform, the Government and the Industry shall come together to discuss how India can be made the next global hub for manufacturing and sourcing of toys by way of attracting investments in the sector and promoting exports.

Over 1000 exhibitors from across 30 States and Union Territories will display their products in an e-commerce enabled virtual exhibition. It will showcase traditional Indian toys as well as modern toys including electronic toys, plush toys, puzzles and games. The fair will also host numerous webinars and panel discussions with eminent Indian and international speakers with proven capabilities in toy design and manufacturing. For children, it is an opportunity to participate in a plethora of activities, including craft demonstrations on traditional toy making and virtual visits to toy museums and factories



Subscribe to #PIB India for official videos on Government of India
All you need to is to press the BELL ICON 🛎 next to the subscribe button
Stay tuned for latest government updates!!

snippet.title: Kya India me Ban Sakta hai Pehla ICE TUNNEL...! | Sonam Wangchuk, Ladakh
snippet.description:
I have harbored this idea of an Ice Tunnel since my engineering days at the National Institute of Technology Srinagar. Snow, Ice, and sub-zero temperatures are the biggest challenges at the remote and high altitude passes of Ladakh. This makes it exceedingly difficult to keep the roads open for more than six months a year. But then the same challenges can become the most abundantly available resources at these difficult locations if we apply them correctly. Ice has high compressive strength and in a parabolic arched tunnel all the forces are compressive only, and since the sub-zero temperatures can keep it frozen most of the year we should be able to make seasonal ice tunnels on high passes in places like Ladakh. 
At the Zojila where a real mountain tunnel is being built, such tunnels could cover the approach roads up to the tunnel, which would be roughly 20 Kms on either side. Keeping these roads cleared of the heavy snowfall and avalanches could easily cost up to a million dollars and roughly 500 tons of Co2 emission each year.
Who knows my crazy Ice Tunnel could become an interesting solution to this challenge… using the problem itself as a solution.

Follow Sonam Wangchuk on Social Media:

Instagram: @wangchuksworld
https://www.instagram.com/wangchuksworld/

snippet.title: Boss | बॉस | Scene 11 | Akshay Kumar | Ronit Roy | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: CHICKEN BBQ | Healthy Country Chicken Barbeque Recipe Cooking In Village | Grilled Chicken Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village, we cook Chicken Barbeque Recipe using country chicken. Normally people use broiler chicken to make BBQ or Grilled Chicken but don't use country chicken. Because country chicken meat is rougher so it's hard to cook easily.

But today we use country chicken and we marinate well with curd and also we take long time cook BBQ to make the chicken fully cooked.

Finally, the taste of chicken and aroma is.. delicious!

localized.title: CHICKEN BBQ | Healthy Country Chicken Barbeque Recipe Cooking In Village | Grilled Chicken Recipe
localized.description:
Today in our village, we cook Chicken Barbeque Recipe using country chicken. Normally people use broiler chicken to make BBQ or Grilled Chicken but don't use country chicken. Because country chicken meat is rougher so it's hard to cook easily.

But today we use country chicken and we marinate well with curd and also we take long time cook BBQ to make the chicken fully cooked.

Finally, the taste of chicken and aroma is.. delicious!

snippet.title: Highlights - Odisha FC 6-5 SC East Bengal - Match 108 | Hero 2020-21
snippet.description:
Odisha FC and SC East Bengal ended their #HeroISL 2020-21 campaign on a record-breaking note at the GMC Stadium in Bambolim.  A total of 11 goals were scored on the night, making it the highest-scoring match in the history of the tournament as Steven Dias' side managed to come away with all three points. A total of eight players were on the score sheet tonight, which included an own goal. 

Watch the highlights of #OFCSCEB and tell us how much you enjoyed the match in the comments below!

#LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

Gaadi se nikle hum chaar dost yaha
Yaaro k Chaaro k chaar khas dost
Unki bandiya bhi saath
Haath mei tangdiya bhi saath
Pr meri vali hi kahi pe so rahi hai

Ye meri gaadi 
Ye mai
Yaha party ho rai hai ..!!

Han ghr se nikli hi ho ab toh
Plan poori raat ka kardu kya
4 peg mei typsy si ho rhi ho
Bolo Peg ek or bhi bhardu kya 
Kardu kya heavy si baat cheet bass ki
Naach tu naach na tension le space ki
Ab chhodo sari baatein or talli hojao
Thumke laga k baby jhalli hojao
Slow and steady vali baat chhodo
Thoda khilji type khali-bali hojao
Dj uchi se lgao
Chahe cheekho ya chillao
Bolo neeche aunty ji ko
Chahe police bulao
Thoda volume up kr
Bass badhao
Kyuki duniya so rhi 

Ye meri daaru
Ye mai
Yaha party ho rai hai !!!


Pilaya hukkah pilayi wine maine
Uske kehne pe mangayi pine majne
Udaya cash maine
Krayi aish maine
Baby k kehne pe
Pilayi hash maine

Hookah pilaya maine wine pilayi maine
Uske kehne pe pine mangayi maine
Aish kra k poora cash udaaya 
Maine baby k kehne pe maal pilaya
2 bje k baad
Fir khule uske raaz 
kisi or k  saath vo dirty ho rhi h

Humari party ho rai hai ..!!!


Ye mere friends 
Ye mai
Humari paati hui hai !

snippet.title: Panghat – Roohi | Rajkummar – Janhvi - Varun | Sachin- Jigar, Amitabh B | Asees K | Divya K|Mellow D
snippet.description:
Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Film - Roohi

Music by: Sachin-Jigar

By Maddock Films 

Lyrics :- 
JULMI BADI AUKAT PE YE RAAT AAYI HAIMANN TO HAI MERA PAWANMAGAR 
YOVAN HARJAI HAIO kAISE HO MILAN BAANKE PIYA SE JAAN MERI ATKI

BAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIPAN PAN PAN PANGHAT KIBAHUT KATHIN HAI DAGAR PANGHAT KI

PANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTIPANGHATPE GAT GAT KARKE PEETI REHTI PEETI REHTISAWARIYA BIN SAJNA KE JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI JEETI REHTI

(RAP)PATATI PATAH PATAANTIKYU TU ITNA BANTIGHANA ATTITUDE GHAMANDIPAR BANEGI TU MERI BANDIKYUKI NAZAROON MAI JABSE TU AATKI ATKIBHUDDHI HAI MERI THODI SATKI SATKIKAMARIYA TERI MATKI MATKIDIL KARE FOOD DOON MAI FATAKI FATAKI PAR

(ANTRA)
O SAIYAAN BAABUJI BUMBAIYATERI BUTTERFALAIYAKABSE BAITHI TERI RAAH TAAKE

DAAAIYA APNE PYAAR KI NAAIYABEECH BHAVAR MAI NAAIYAPAAR LAGA JOGAN KE BAAGH JAGE

O MERI FULJADIYO RESABAR ZARA KARIYO RE

HAANSABAR KARTE HUE KITNA BHARUUN MAIHANDPUMP SE MATKI

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:- 
Creative director:- Amrinder Singh 
Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hansika Motwani Team:  
Hairstylist: Savita Dnyanoba Sankpal 
Makeup Artist: Reshma Merchant 
Costume: Pranab Sood
BTS team: Paul Davidson 

Gurmeet Choudhary Team
Makeup: Sangeeta Rawal 
Makeup Assitant: Rasika Shinde 
Hair: Asir Sayeed (team HAKIM AALIM )
Costume: Yash Badheka
Manager: Vasudha Grover ( TOABH ENTERTAINMENT)
Driver: Pintu Yaadav 
Personal assistant: Pintu yaadav


Line production - Vikrant kaushik, Adesh Gola, Arun Paharia 
Mumbai Production - Anuj Tiwari
Digital Partner - Coin Digital 

#BPraak
#Mazaa
#Jaani 
#ArvindrKhaira 
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics:
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Baho Mein So ke, Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Also, listen to the song on: 
Gaana:https://gaana.com/album/mazaa
JioSaavn: http://bit.ly/37EnmVG
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/t8jBiqRa2
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/2P4qXWA
Hungama: http://bit.ly/3uq0pPx
Amazon Prime Music: https://amzn.to/37EnN2g
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJde2HrB/
YT Music: https://bit.ly/3qKFBA5
Apple Music: http://apple.co/3pRDYPQ

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Virat Tries To Strangle Heer To Death | Highlight
snippet.description:
Heer runs to Virat with bleeding legs. When Virat locks himself up in the room, Heer goes to him through the window, but he tries to strangle her. Isha demands an answer from Parmeet about her future. Parmeet reassures Isha that she'll never ever accept Heer as her daughter-in-law.

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KusVyyPVbjq01VFZnOJE_f-

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Love Guru || Nazarbattu || Pawan Yadav
snippet.description:
A heartbroken boy named Gopal is searching for the true love of his life. But he is loved by no one, no one likes him because of his dark color and clothing style. One day he meets a love guru who changed his life. He taught him how to dress and how to impress a girl and within few days Gopal successively impressed the love of his life. Enjoy this romcom episode with lots of fun and twists.

#loveguru #LoveStory

snippet.title: घर मे बरकत और सुखसमृद्धि केलिए करें सरल उपाय/दैनिक जीवन में काम आनेवाली रहस्यमयी बातें kitchen vastu
snippet.description:
#vastushastra  #wealthtips #घरगृहस्थी.

#माधीपूर्णिमा #वास्तुशास्त्र #घरसंसार.

https://youtu.be/fX1T1zh27U4
पूर्णिमा तिथि ब्रत पूजा विधि.
मार्गशीर्ष पूर्णिमा कब है कैसे करें पूर्णिमा तिथि पर पूजन क्या है नियम व उद्मापन बिधी पूर्णिमा ब्रत.
https://youtu.be/oLhijHGam_M
पूर्णिमा पर शिव जी का पूजन करना चाहिए, शंख की भी पूजा करते हैं। 
https://youtu.be/SHXbE7ouK0o
सूर्य अस्त के बाद खुले आसमान के नीचे  एक लकड़ी की चौकी पर सफेद कपड़ा विधाएं उस पर साबुत चावल के दाने डालें उस पर एक शंख रखें फिर गाय का दूध जल बराबर मात्रा में मिला कर शंख को स्नान कराएं जल से एक बार शुद्ध करें चंदन लगाएं सफेद या अशटगंध का सफेद पुष्प अक्षय धूप दीपक जलाएं ऋतु फल या खीर कि भोग लगाएं,  चंद्रमा के मंत्रों का जप करें।  परिक्रमा और अर्धय दें।   इस प्रकार पूजा बिधी सम्पूर्ण करें।। धन्यवाद।।
शिव रात्रि पूजा बिधी, रुद्राभिषेक किन तिथियों में करना शुभ कारी होगा।
https://youtu.be/H-KbxIkD_ug
कैसे करें शिव पूजा, शिव पूजा में भविष्य पुराण, शिव पुराण के अनुसार  फूलों का चयन, शिव पूजा में फूलों का चयन करने शिव भोले बाबा को मनाएं।
पीरियड में महिलाएं शिवरात्रि पर कैसे करें शिव पूजा। 
https://youtu.be/FM5wgLWtJsE
शिवरात्रि पर कैसे करें शिव जी की पूजा रूद्राभिषेक किन तिथि यों में करना विषेश फलदायी माना जाता है। रूद्राभिषेक करने के नियम, किन वस्तुओं से रूद्राभिषेक करने से मनोकामना पूर्ण होगी,
https://youtu.be/0xUatij3Ago
महाशिवरात्रि पर करें सरल उपाय
https://youtu.be/rWMBmIUWwQI
शिव रात्रि पर कैसे करें सरल पूजा। 
https://youtu.be/Oih8xrxDNnM
शिव रात्रि पर घर में पूजा करना चाहिए या मंदिर में पूरी जानकारी
https://youtu.be/SCzoVMLdhrg
मंदिर से मिले फूल व घर के मंदिर में चढ़े फूलों का हमें क्या करना चाहिए जाने
https://youtu.be/5pBjVkxFcTs
महालक्ष्मी पूजा में सूप की महिमा, महत्व।। 
https://youtu.be/Jlwx7itCXao
tags: घर मे बरकत और सुखसमृद्धि के सरल उपाय दैनिक जीवन में काम आनेवाली महत्वपूर्ण बातें
घर मे खुशियाली और बरकत के लिए करें वास्तु के उपाय
घर मे बरकत के आसान न उपाय
कैसा भी दुर्भाग्य हो इन चीजों के दान से दूर होगा
घर मे सुख समृद्धि के लिए सबसे सरल और आसान उपाय
घर मे सुख समृद्धि चाहिए तो जरूर करें ये उपाय.

snippet.title: ഡിംപലിന്റെ യൂണിഫോം തേടി കട്ടപ്പനയിലേക്ക് !!! Dimpal Bhal | Julit | Bigg Boss Season 3 | Asianet
snippet.description:
ബിഗ്‌ബോസ് ഹൗസിലും, സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിലും, ഡിംപലിന്റെ യൂണിഫോം ചർച്ചകൾ കൊടുമ്പിരികൊള്ളുമ്പോൾ .. 
ജൂലിയറ്റിന്റെ കട്ടപ്പനയിലേക്ക് സത്യം തേടി .. 

പ്രേക്ഷകരുടെ കമന്റ് അനുസരിച്ചു  റീ എഡിറ്റു ചെയ്‌തത്‌ കാണാൻ 🙏  .

Bigg Boss Malayalam Season 3 made its premiere on February 14. With Mohanlal as the host, the 14 contestants include various artists from different fields. The host also revealed that the contestants will go through two-week mandatory quarantine before entering the house. They will be allowed to enter only after they test negative for coronavirus.

The contestants are actor Nobby Marcose, Psychologist Dimple Bhal, RJ Firoz who is also known as 'Kidilam' Firoz, Tv actor Manikuttan, Powerlifting champion and medical student Majiziya Bhanu, DJ Soorya J Meno, Musician A Lekshmi Jayan, Model Sai Vishnu, TV actor Anoop Krishnan, Debater Adoney T John, 'D4' dance winner and youngest contestant Muhammed Ramzan, model and singer Rithu Manthra, Yoga instructor Sandhya Manoj, and dubbing artist Bhagyalakshmi.

Team Keraleeyam_News #Malayalivartha #news#Dimpalbal​  #latest_news #keraleeyam #Manikuttan​ #BIGGBOSSSEASON3​ #malayalam #breaking_news#MalayalamNews. #ASIANET​ #MOOPANSVLOG #LatestNewsUpdatesMalayalam.#SAIVISHNU​ #BBMS3ViralCut​ #Bhagyalakshmi​ #RITHUMANTHRA​ #Kidilanfiroz​ #LALETTAN​  #Ramsan​ #BIGGBOSSMALLUTALKS
കേരളീയം ന്യൂസ -  രാഷ്ട്രീയം, സമകാലിക വൃത്താന്തം, ബ്രേക്കിംഗ് ന്യൂസ്, കായികം, ആരോഗ്യം, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം,  വിനോദം തുടങ്ങി ദേശീയ അന്തർദേശീയ വാർത്തകൾ കാണികളിലേക്ക് എത്തിക്കുന്നു. 
നേര് .... നേരോടെ .... നേരത്തെ .. അറിയാൻ   ഈ ചാനൽ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ...

➤ Lyrics 
En jeevanaya priyane ni ende matramavile..
En jeevanang tannekam oru naalil ni manjidalle...
Aha naatumavinde chotil naam kootu koodillee...
kanatha nalugalilellaam mindan kothichathallee..
Qulbinde taalamalle ni..karalinde naalamalle ni
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

Duniyavil mohabathumai njan ninde koode nilkam..
oru vaakil nin nokil kothiyoode vann punaram..
Oru nooru janamamen roohilaay ni vannuchernidenam..
Ee logamannu nalkunna pranayavum niyumaaidenam..
Ini illa mannilay ninnil pakaramay vera maaranennil..
                                                   (en jeevanaya)

En munnilay ida nenjilay ni annu vanna neram..
Kuliraayidum anuraagavum hrdayathilay cherthu..
Chuvarum paranju njanum arinju avanende roohumenn..
Pakalil thelinju irulil padarnu en qulbilaayolicch..
Ee kaalamere avanood kootu koodan kothikunnu njan
                                                   (en jeevanaya)
...................................................................................................

എൻ ജീവനായ പ്രിയനേ നീ എന്റെ മാത്രമാവില്ലെ 
എൻ ജീവനങ്ങ് തന്നേക്കാം ഒരു നാലില്ല നീ മാഞ്ഞിടല്ലെ.......
ആ നാട്ടുമാവിന്റെ ചോട്ടിൽ നാം കൂട്ടു കൂടിയില്ലെ.....
 കാണാത്ത നാളുകളില്ലെല്ലാം മിണ്ടാൻ കൊതിച്ചതല്ലെ.......
കൽബിന്റെ താളമല്ലെ നീ കരളിന്റെ നാളമല്ലേ നീ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )

ദുനിയാവിലെ മുഹബതുമായി ഞാൻ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം
 ഒരു വാക്കിൽ നിൻ നോക്കിൽ നിന്റെ കൂടെ നിൽക്കാം....
ഒരു നൂറു ജന്മമെൻ റൂഹിലായി നീ വന്നു ചേർന്നിടെണo......
ഇനി ഇല്ലാ മണ്ണിലായി നിൻ പകരമായി വേറെ മാരനെന്നിൽ...... 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )
എൻ മുന്നിലായി ഇട നെഞ്ചിലായി നീ അന്നു വന്ന നേരം...
കുളിരായിടും അനുരാകവും ഹൃദയത്തിലായി ചേർത്തു..
ചുവരും പറഞ്ഞു ഞാനും അറിഞ്ഞു അവനെന്റെ റുഹുമെന്ന്..
ഈ കാലമെറെ അവനോട് കൂട്ടു കൂടാൻ കൊതിക്കുന്നു ഞാൻ 
                                                                (എൻ ജീവനായ )

...................................................................................................

snippet.title: Kiston – Roohi | Rajkummar – Janhvi – Varun | Sachin -  Jigar, Amitabh B | Jubin Nautiyal
snippet.description:
Kiston, a soulful melody sung by our king of hearts, Jubin Nautiyal. 
Composed by Sachin-Jigar and lyrics by Amitabh Bhattacharya, this one will surely make you fall in love!

Listen to Kiston on :

JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/kiston-from-roohi/JhI4exsCYXg
Gaana - https://gaana.com/album/kiston-from-roohi
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/0CaKRGxx3bB0ZsIgzx7ivt?si=XHCxevvaQnONLvKAuXIkaw&utm_source=whatsapp
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJdpAkAm/
Wynk music - https://wynk.in/u/AvgQl3Fhf
Apple music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/kiston-from-roohi-single/1555532199?ls


Singer - Jubin Nautiyal , Sachin- Jigar
Music Composer - Sachin - Jigar
Lyricist - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Arranged & Programmed - Sachin- Jigar
Assistant Programmers - Hrishikesh Gangan & Abhishek Singh
Music Production Head - Romil Ved
Mix & Mastered - Eric Pillai @ FSOB Studios
Assistant Mix Engineer - Michael Edwin Pillai
Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma 
Directed by: Hardik Mehta 
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba 
Music by: Sachin-Jigar
A Jio Studios Release
By Maddock Films

Lyrics:

Chup chup ke 
dilbar ka deedar kar
Aye dil tu ahista izhaar kar

Saara ka saara na karna abhi se
aasaan kistonmai tu pyaar kar 

Chup chup ke 
dilbar ka deedar kar
Aye dil tu ahista izhaar kar

Pagle Saara ka saara na karna abhi se
aasaan kistonmai tu pyaar kar


(Antra)
Pehle nibha ke dekhi hai tune 
mehngi mohabbat vilayati 
Pad jaaey jismai lena ka dena 
Ghate ka sauda milawati .

Karna agar hi hai 
tu pyaar karle 
sasta swadeshi kifayati 

pehli tu jitna laparwaah tha 
Utna sambhal ke hi  is baar kar

Pagle Saara ka saara na karna abhi se
aasaan kistonmai tu pyaar kar

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd(C) 2021

main tere muh ne tod dungi

snippet.title: Challenging Star Darshan Clarifies On His Fans Misbehavior With Actor Jaggesh In Mysuru
snippet.description:
Challenging Star Darshan Clarifies On His Fans Misbehavior With Actor Jaggesh In Mysuru | ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳ ವರ್ತನೆ ವಿಷ್ಯ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು: ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟನೆ

ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ಅತಿರೇಕದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ, ಟಿವಿ9 ಜತೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌, ಘಟನೆಯ ವಿಷಯ ತಮಗೆ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು. ನಾನು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಿಂದ ಹೊರಗಿದ್ದೆ. ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟರು. ನಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾನಾಡದೇ ಮತ್ಯಾರ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ಎಷ್ಟಾದ್ರೂ ಅವರು ಹಿರಿಯರು ಎಂದು ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ಹಾಗೂ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ನಡೆದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟಿಕರಣ ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ನೋಡಿ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಏನ್‌ ಹೇಳಿದ್ರು ಅನ್ನೋದು...

ಮೈಸೂರಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ಜತೆ ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ಅತಿರೇಕದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ, ಟಿವಿ9 ಜತೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌, ಘಟನೆಯ ವಿಷಯ ತಮಗೆ ತಡವಾಗಿ ಗೊತ್ತಾಯಿತು. ನಾನು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಿಂದ ಹೊರಗಿದ್ದೆ. ಜಗ್ಗೆಶ್‌ ಹಿರಿಯ ನಟರು. ನಮ್ಮ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾನಾಡದೇ ಮತ್ಯಾರ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ಎಷ್ಟಾದ್ರೂ ಅವರು ಹಿರಿಯರು ಎಂದು ತಮ್ಮ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳು ಹಾಗೂ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್‌ ನಡುವೆ ನಡೆದ ಘಟನೆ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸ್ಪಷ್ಟಿಕರಣ ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ನೋಡಿ ಚಾಲೆಂಜಿಂಗ್‌ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ದರ್ಶನ್‌ ಏನ್‌ ಹೇಳಿದ್ರು ಅನ್ನೋದು...

snippet.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, February 2021
snippet.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi, while highlighting the innovative spirit among the country's youth to become self-reliant, said, "Aatmanirbhar Bharat has become a national spirit." PM Modi praised efforts of individuals from across the country for their innovations, plantation and biodiversity conservation in Assam. He also shared a unique sports commentary in Sanskrit.

snippet.title: Gada परिवार को मिली खुशखबरी -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3111 -26th Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/sunder-brings-good-news-1000109328?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3111: Gada Family Gets A Good News
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
All the male members of Gokuldham Society have come to meet Jethalal. At Jethalal's place, everyone gets to know that Bapu Ji knows everything about the problem with Ramson company. Everyone offers Jethalal a small amount to help him but Jethalal informs them that Bapu Ji has given him the idea to deal with this problem. Bapu Ji has suggested selling their ancestral land. Sunder call Jethalal to give the good news that he has got the buyer for the land. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now on SonyLIV.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
tags: Jetha Reveals The Truth Of His Tension

snippet.title: Will Rubina Dilaik & Rahul Vaidya be friends again?🔥
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe :- https://bit.ly/SiddharthKannan
Bigg Boss 14 winner, Rubina Dilaik in an exclusive conversation with me, spoke about why she participated in the reality show with her husband, Abhinav Shukla.

She also revealed that her friend turned foe, Jasmin Bhasin did not wish her for her win and whether she will be ever friends with her.

Rubina mentioned about her cold relationship with Rahul Vaidya and also whether her friendship with Aly Goni will be affected due to Jasmin.

Watch out for this free-wheeling chat with the stunner.

#rubinadialik #jasminbhasin #biggboss14
